sentences.arabic: الْجَمَلُ حَيَوَانٌ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا فِي حَيَاةِ الْبَدْوِ الْعَرَبِ.
sentences.translation: Deva je veoma važna životinja u životu arapskih beduina.
sentences.translationEn: The camel is a very important animal in the life of Arab Bedouins.

sentences.arabic: يَحْمِلُ الْجَمَلُ الْأَمْتِعَةَ وَيُوَفِّرُ الْحَلِيبَ وَاللَّحْمَ لِصَاحِبِهِ.
sentences.translation: Deva nosi prtljagu i daje mlijeko i meso svom vlasniku.
sentences.translationEn: It carries luggage and provides milk and meat for its owner.

sentences.arabic: يَتَحَمَّلُ الْجَمَلُ الْحَرَّ الشَّدِيدَ وَيَمْشِي مَسَافَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً بِدُونِ مَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Deva podnosi veliku vrućinu i prelazi duge udaljenosti bez vode.
sentences.translationEn: The camel endures intense heat and travels long distances without water.

sentences.arabic: لِهَذَا يُسَمِّيهِ الْعَرَبُ «سَفِينَةَ الصَّحْرَاءِ» وَيُكِنُّونَ لَهُ احْتِرَامًا كَبِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Zato je Arapi nazivaju «brodom pustinje» i prema njoj gaje veliko poštovanje.
sentences.translationEn: For this reason Arabs call it the 'ship of the desert' and hold it in great respect.
